title: Join a live session from pre-join by providing a display name
description: Verifies a guest can enter a display name on the pre-join screen and enter the participant live session view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill a valid 6-character room code into the join input field
Submit the join request
Fill a non-empty display name into the display name field
Submit the pre-join form to enter the session
Verify the participant live session view is displayed

title: Join a session from landing using a valid 6-character code
description: Verifies a guest can enter a valid 6-character room code in the landing join modal and reach the participant pre-join screen for that session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill a valid 6-character room code into the join input field
Submit the join request
Verify the participant pre-join screen for that session is displayed

title: Upvote a queued track and see the vote state change
description: Verifies a participant can upvote a queue item and the UI reflects the toggled vote state and updated count.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill a valid 6-character room code into the join input field
Submit the join request
Fill a non-empty display name into the display name field
Submit the pre-join form to enter the session
Fill a valid YouTube URL into the Add to Queue input field
Submit adding the track to the queue
Click upvote for the newly added queue item
Verify the upvote state is toggled and the vote count is updated

title: Join a session from landing using a full invite URL
description: Verifies a guest can paste a valid invite URL into the landing join modal and reach the participant pre-join screen for the parsed session code.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill a valid invite URL containing a session join code into the join input field
Submit the join request
Verify the participant pre-join screen for that session is displayed

title: Add a track via keyboard search suggestions and see it in the queue
description: Verifies a participant can search for a track, select a suggestion with the keyboard, add it, and see it appear in the queue.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill a valid 6-character room code into the join input field
Submit the join request
Fill a non-empty display name into the display name field
Submit the pre-join form to enter the session
Fill a search query into the Add to Queue input field
Press ArrowDown to highlight a suggestion
Press Enter to select the highlighted suggestion
Submit adding the selected track to the queue
Verify the new track appears in the queue

title: Create a new host session from the dashboard and reach host room with join code
description: Verifies an authenticated host can create a new session from the dashboard and lands in the host session view with a join code visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the action to host a new session
Verify the host lands in the host live session view for the newly created session
Verify a session join code is displayed

title: Add a track using a valid YouTube URL
description: Verifies a participant can add a track by pasting a valid YouTube URL and the track appears in the queue.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill a valid 6-character room code into the join input field
Submit the join request
Fill a non-empty display name into the display name field
Submit the pre-join form to enter the session
Fill a valid YouTube URL into the Add to Queue input field
Submit adding the track to the queue
Verify the new track appears in the queue

title: Stop a running session and see the ended-session recap inline
description: Verifies the host can stop the session from Settings and then sees an inline ended-session recap with participant and song lists.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Click the control to create a new session
Open Settings from the sidebar
Click the control to stop the session
Verify an ended-session recap view is displayed in the host session view
Verify participant and songs-played lists are displayed in the recap

title: Login shows authenticated dashboard
description: Verifies an existing host can log in with valid credentials and reaches the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated host dashboard is displayed

title: Create a new session from Settings and get redirected to a new host room
description: Verifies the host can use Settings to create a new session and is redirected to a new host session view with a join code.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Click the control to create a new session
Open Settings from the sidebar
Click the control to create a new session from Settings
Verify the host live session view is displayed for a newly created session
Verify a join code is visible in the host session view

title: Sign up creates a new host account and shows authenticated dashboard
description: Verifies a new host can sign up with display name, email, and password and then sees the authenticated dashboard greeting.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Select the sign up tab
Fill a new display name into the display name field
Fill a new unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the create account form
Verify the authenticated host dashboard is displayed
Verify a welcome greeting is displayed that includes the new display name

title: See empty-session state where playback is disabled when no current song is active
description: Verifies the host can observe the empty-session state where playback controls are disabled before any current track is active.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Click the control to create a new session
Verify playback controls are disabled in the floating playback dock
Verify the now playing area indicates nothing is currently playing

title: Open an existing session from the dashboard session list
description: Verifies an authenticated host can open a session from the previous sessions list and reaches the host session view with the join code displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to open a session from the previous sessions list
Verify the host lands in the host live session view for that session
Verify a session join code is displayed

title: Copy invite link from the host session view
description: Verifies the host can copy the invite link from the host session view and sees a copy confirmation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Click the control to create a new session
Click the invite link copy control
Wait for the copy confirmation state to appear
Verify a copied confirmation state is visible for the invite link

title: Logout returns host to unauthenticated auth gate
description: Verifies an authenticated host can log out from the dashboard and is returned to the unauthenticated auth gate view.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click logout
Verify the host sees the authentication gate with login and signup options

title: Display session information on pre-join screen
description: Verifies the pre-join screen shows the session info card including host name and room code for a valid session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill a valid 6-character room code into the join input field
Submit the join request
Verify the session info card is displayed with host information and a room code

title: Edit display name successfully and see it updated
description: Verifies a participant can edit their display name and the updated name appears in the session header and People tab.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill a valid 6-character room code into the join input field
Submit the join request
Fill a non-empty display name into the display name field
Submit the pre-join form to enter the session
Open the edit display name dialog
Fill a new non-empty display name into the display name field
Save the display name change
Verify the updated display name is shown in the session header

title: After stopping, session controls no longer allow stopping again
description: Verifies that once the host stops a session, the stop-session control is no longer available in Settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Click the control to create a new session
Open Settings from the sidebar
Click the control to stop the session
Open Settings from the sidebar
Verify the option to stop the session is not available

title: Show session-not-found error for a non-existent code on landing
description: Verifies entering a valid-looking 6-character code that does not exist shows a session-not-found inline error in the join modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill a valid 6-character code that is expected to not exist into the join input field
Submit the join request
Verify a session-not-found inline error is displayed

title: Show session-not-found message on pre-join for an invalid session code
description: Verifies navigating to a pre-join screen for a non-existent code shows a session-not-found message.

steps.description: Navigate to /session/AAAAAA/join
Verify a session-not-found message is displayed for the code

title: Reject whitespace-only display name changes
description: Verifies a participant cannot save a whitespace-only display name and sees an error toast.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill a valid 6-character room code into the join input field
Submit the join request
Fill a non-empty display name into the display name field
Submit the pre-join form to enter the session
Open the edit display name dialog
Fill whitespace-only text into the display name field
Save the display name change
Verify an error toast is displayed rejecting an empty display name

title: Copy invite link from Invite Friends modal
description: Verifies a participant can open the Invite Friends modal and copy the invite link with a visible copied confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill a valid 6-character room code into the join input field
Submit the join request
Fill a non-empty display name into the display name field
Submit the pre-join form to enter the session
Open the Invite Friends modal
Click to copy the invite link
Wait for the copy confirmation state to appear
Verify a copy confirmation is visible in the invite modal

title: Reject invalid join input format on landing
description: Verifies the join modal blocks non-parsable input and shows an inline invalid-format error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill invalid text that cannot be parsed into a 6-character code into the join input field
Submit the join request
Verify an inline invalid-format validation error is displayed

title: Invalid login shows error toast
description: Verifies a host entering an invalid password is shown an authentication error toast and is not logged in.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill an invalid password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error toast is visible

title: Close Join Room modal without navigating away
description: Verifies a guest can close the join modal and remain on the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Close the modal
Verify the landing page remains visible and the modal is closed
